title: Some admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite
impact: Admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

updates.content:
Title: Some admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite

User impact: Admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

More info: Affected admins can’t remove Restricted entities from the Microsoft Defender XDR portal, Exchange Online admin center, or PowerShell.

Current status: We've identified that the impact we previously communicated for under MO1297784 is reoccurring. We're reviewing the details of the issue and will provide an update within 30 minutes.

Scope of impact: Admins removing blocked users from the Restricted Entities page in Microsoft 365 suite may be impacted.

Title: Some admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite

User impact: Admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

More info: Affected admins can’t remove Restricted entities from the Microsoft Defender XDR portal, Exchange Online admin center, or PowerShell.

Current status: We identified that our previous fix for the issue could have caused additional service degradation. We reverted the fix, causing this impact to reoccur and are now rolling back to a previously known stable build to remediate the impact. Affected users should experience relief as the rollback progresses.

Scope of impact: Admins removing blocked users from the Restricted Entities page in Microsoft 365 suite may be impacted.

Start time: Saturday, May 2, 2026, at 12:15 AM UTC

Root cause: A modification made to a previous change is resulting in admins potentially receiving an error when removing a blocked user from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

Next update by: Monday, May 4, 2026, at 7:30 PM UTC
